en_title: Is Spider-Man in Marvel's Wolverine? And Who Does Wolverine Team Up With?
cn_title: 《漫威金刚狼》确认无蜘蛛侠，但将与宿敌组队
subtitle: 宿敌变队友
opus_summary: Insomniac在索尼State of Play前夕接受IGN专访，确认《漫威金刚狼》与《漫威蜘蛛侠》同属漫威宇宙1048，但蜘蛛侠不会登场。金刚狼将与X战警成员琴·葛蕾以及宿敌剑齿虎并肩作战，但和剑齿虎的合作更像竞争性同盟——剑齿虎会抢人头。游戏全程仅操控金刚狼，无其他可玩角色。本作将于2026年9月15日独占登陆PS5。

paragraphs.en: Ahead of Sony’s State of Play broadcast , I had the chance to interview Insomniac about all things Marvel’s Wolverine. Check out the interview in full to find out exactly how the game plays and what to expect, but there are a few features worth digging into separately: one, Spider-Man is not in the game, and two, Wolverine actually teams up with a surprising character.
paragraphs.cn: 在索尼State of Play直播前夕，我有机会采访了Insomniac，聊了聊《漫威金刚狼》的方方面面。完整采访会告诉你游戏的具体玩法和值得期待的内容，但有几个要点值得单独拿出来说：第一，蜘蛛侠不会出现在游戏中；第二，金刚狼实际上会与一个令人意外的角色组队。

paragraphs.en: Let’s start with the Spider-Man question. While Marvel’s Wolverine and Marvel’s Spider-Man take place in the same Marvel universe (Insomniac has a Marvel universe all to itself, numbered 1048), just as Wolverine isn’t in Insomniac’s Spider-Man games, neither is Spider-Man in Wolverine.
paragraphs.cn: 先来说说蜘蛛侠的问题。虽然《漫威金刚狼》和《漫威蜘蛛侠》设定在同一个漫威宇宙中（Insomniac拥有一个专属的漫威宇宙，编号1048），但就像金刚狼没有出现在Insomniac的蜘蛛侠游戏中一样，蜘蛛侠也不会出现在《金刚狼》里。

paragraphs.en: “It's correct that it does take place in the 1048 Marvel Universe, which is the Insomniac video game universe. It happens in the same world, but we don't have any crossover. Spider-Man will not be making an appearance in Wolverine,” creative director Marcus Smith told IGN, definitively.
paragraphs.cn: 「没错，游戏确实设定在1048号漫威宇宙，也就是Insomniac的游戏宇宙。故事发生在同一个世界，但我们没有任何交叉。蜘蛛侠不会在《金刚狼》中登场，」创意总监Marcus Smith明确告诉IGN。

paragraphs.en: So, no Wolverine / Spider-Man teamup. But Wolverine does team up with some other characters more familiar to the X-Men comics. In the gameplay trailer we see Wolverine and Jean Grey battle bad guys, each setting up enemies for co-op takedowns. But Insomniac told IGN that Wolverine also teams up with Sabretooth, one of his arch nemesis.
paragraphs.cn: 所以，金刚狼和蜘蛛侠不会联手。但金刚狼确实会与X战警漫画中更熟悉的角色组队。在实机预告中，我们看到金刚狼和琴·葛蕾并肩作战，互相为对方创造合作击杀的机会。但Insomniac告诉IGN，金刚狼还会与他的宿敌之一——剑齿虎组队。

paragraphs.en: That’s certainly surprising — you’d think the last person Wolverine would want to work together with is Sabretooth. But, as game director Mike Daly told IGN, it’s less that the two work together, and more that they are fighting against a common enemy next to each other.
paragraphs.cn: 这确实令人惊讶——你可能会认为金刚狼最不想合作的人就是剑齿虎。但正如游戏总监Mike Daly告诉IGN的那样，与其说两人是合作，不如说他们是在并肩对抗共同的敌人。

paragraphs.en: "In this game, Logan and Sabretooth are actually on a team together, but the way they ally is not really anything like the way you ally with Jean Gray," Daly said. "Logan and Sabretooth have a very competitive dynamic between them. Whereas Jean Gray might give you an opportunity to get a kill, with Sabretooth fighting alongside you, it's more like, you think you've got a kill and he rushes in to steal it from you, and their combat banter brings out that dynamic and makes the whole fight more fun."
paragraphs.cn: 「在本作中，罗根和剑齿虎确实同属一个团队，但他们结盟的方式与你和琴·葛蕾结盟的方式完全不同，」Daly说道。「罗根和剑齿虎之间有一种非常竞争的关系。琴·葛蕾可能会给你创造击杀机会，而剑齿虎在你身边战斗时，更像是你以为自己能拿到击杀，他却冲进来抢走，他们之间的战斗调侃会凸显这种动态，让整个战斗更有趣。」

paragraphs.en: Related to this co-op mechanic is the question of whether you play as any guest characters in Marvel’s Wolverine. The Spider-Man games feature sequences where you play as other characters. There’s a memorable sequence where you get to play as Venom in Marvel’s Spider-Man 2, for example. You also have sections where you play as MJ.
paragraphs.cn: 与这种合作机制相关的问题是：在《漫威金刚狼》中，你是否能操控其他客串角色？蜘蛛侠游戏中有一些让你扮演其他角色的关卡。例如，《漫威蜘蛛侠2》中有一段令人难忘的流程，你可以扮演毒液。此外，你还可以扮演MJ。

paragraphs.en: However, in Marvel’s Wolverine, you play as Wolverine only. There are no side quests or missions where you play as another character. “This game is all about Wolverine and you play Wolverine the whole way through,” Daly said. “We wanted to keep the focus on him throughout the whole story.”
paragraphs.cn: 然而，在《漫威金刚狼》中，你只能扮演金刚狼。没有可以扮演其他角色的支线任务或关卡。「这款游戏完全是关于金刚狼的，你全程都在扮演金刚狼，」Daly说道。「我们希望在整个故事中始终聚焦于他。」

paragraphs.en: We have plenty more on Marvel’s Wolverine at the interview in full . It’s due out exclusively on PS5 on September 15, 2026. And here's everything announced at State of Play June 2026 if you need a catch up on what PlayStation has in store.
paragraphs.cn: 完整采访中还有更多关于《漫威金刚狼》的内容。本作将于2026年9月15日独占登陆PS5。如果你想了解PlayStation准备了什么，这里是2026年6月State of Play公布的所有内容。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。在Twitter上关注他 @wyp100。可通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com联系Wesley，或通过wyp100@proton.me进行保密联系。
